prevalence.trend: stable; risk influenced by prosthetic devices and rheumatic heart disease

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Modified Duke criteria; blood cultures and echocardiography (TTE/TEE)

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; depends on early diagnosis and access to cardiac surgery

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Blood culture availability and echocardiography in referral hospitals
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Prolonged IV antibiotics; surgery for complications or prosthetic infection
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Delayed diagnosis, limited access to TEE and cardiac surgery in some regions
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Tertiary centers with established endocarditis teams in major cities
